active_verify.decision_reason: artifact_path must be a repo-relative path under benchmarks/results; primitive_correctness_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; c1_baseline_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; serial_bridge_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; profiler_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; compiler_version_file must be a repo-relative path under benchmarks/results; primitive c>N correctness gate did not pass: no primitive correctness artifact path provided; scaling comparison vs c=1 and serial bridge baselines is incomplete; profiler trace was not captured with expected kernels present; profiler.artifact_path must be under benchmarks/results; profiler.source_artifact_path must be a non-empty string; profiler.output_format must be csv; profiler.trace_dir must be a non-empty string; profiler.trace_files must be a non-empty string list; profiler.synthesized_fields must be a string list; profiler.status must be captured; profiler.expected_kernels_present must be true; profiler.trace_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.expected_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.kernel_durations_ns must be a non-empty object; profiler kernel names must include selected projection_dispatch candidate or variant; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.requested_mode must be batched_lm_head; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.native_row_aware_lm_head must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.mode must be batched_lm_head; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.c2_equality_green must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.equality_rows must be an int; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.equality_artifact must be under benchmarks/results; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns has no observations; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns observation count must cover graph_bucket_stats.hits
active_verify.label: active_c2_verify_serial_default

commands.guard: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json

conclusion: Current no-flag c2 serial-sampler default loaded c1, c2 serial-bridge, primitive c2 correctness, and the serial-sampler profiler evidence while preserving generated-token equality [137,137]. Batch/decode/projection blockers are empty and native_caware_decode=true. Scaling references are complete (aggregate_vs_c1=0.8441, aggregate_vs_serial_bridge=1.0767), but this is required runtime evidence only: aggregate-vs-c1 remains below 1.0 and the attached profiler source is a serial-sampler profiler summary rather than a retained-gate-shaped batched-sampler trace. No retained throughput/scaling claim is made.
